Our trips
🌅 Ibiza🥐 Paris
Paris · 31 Aug – 4 Sept 2026

Paris,
unplanned

Five gorgeous flats for the whole group, all dead-central. Pick whichever the girls love — then just wander out from it.

👯‍♀️ 8 of us🌙 4 nights🏠 5 options
🥐 The vibe: chill and unscripted. We picked beautiful places we can all stay in together, central, steps from the metro and the big train stations — so it's choose-your-own-adventure every day. Roll out for pastries, wander to whatever's close, no rigid plan.

① Opéra · the calm one

Merveil — Signature Suite, Opéra

📍 Rue de la Grange Batelière · 9th arr. (Opéra / Grands Boulevards)
8 guests4 bedrooms5 beds5.5 bathsEntire flat
★★★★★4.86 · 28 reviewsGuest Favorite · Merveil host
The damage · per person
Split 8 ways
$501 /person
all-in for 4 nights
Whole apartment
$4,010 total
$1,002 / night for all of us
Prices include all fees · Free cancellation before 1 Aug · Self check-in with a lockbox
🍳 Kitchen📶 Wifi❄️ A/C🛁 Bathtub🧺 Washer + dryer📺 TV💻 Workspace🪟 Courtyard view+ 49 more
The place

An elegant, contemporary apartment in the heart of Paris — noble materials, soft blue hues, walnut and marble, a serene calm with classic Haussmann moldings. Steps from the covered passages, the Drouot auction house, and a thousand restaurants and bars.

The fully-equipped kitchen and giant dining table mean lazy in-apartment mornings (pastries from the boulangerie downstairs) and pre-dinner drinks together — exactly the unplanned, all-together energy we wanted.

What guests rate it

4.8Comms
4.9Location
4.6Value
The finest Airbnb I've ever stayed in — the crown molding, the fixtures, the fabric walls, all felt like a high-end luxury hotel.Kerri · London · March 2026
The perfect place to stay with my 5 girlfriends — modern, clean, great neighborhood and the metro right there.Dana · Group trip · April 2026
Excellent, close to the metro, surrounded by great cafés, in a safe, pleasant neighborhood.Jessica · Atlanta · Dec 2025
Location 16Comfort 11Hospitality 10Indoor spaces 8Getting around 7Walkability 5
Why it nails the brief
  • Dead-central: 9th arr., Opéra/Grands Boulevards — guests rate location 4.9, metro a 5-min walk.
  • Train-ready: Gare du Nord & Gare de l'Est ~10 min away; metro at the corner.
  • All of us, together: 4 bedrooms + 5.5 baths — no one's fighting for a bathroom.
  • Girls-trip approved: reviewers literally describe staying here with their girlfriend groups.

② Mauroy · the glam one

Merveil — Luxury Suite, Mauroy I

📍 Opéra area · 9th arr. · same host, calm street, lively quarter
12 guests6 bedrooms7 beds3.5 bathsEntire flat
★★★★★4.72 · 74 reviewsSame host · 9 yrs hosting

Prices include all fees · Free cancellation before 1 Aug · Self check-in with a lockbox
🍳 Kitchen📶 Wifi🛗 Elevator🛁 Bathtub🧺 Washer + dryer📺 HDTV💻 Workspace+ 47 more
The place

A maximalist, glam flat refurbished by an architect — orange & green velvet, art-deco chandeliers, glints of gold, a playful 70s feel. Built for a large group on a calm street in the lively Opéra quarter.

It's bigger than the calm one — 6 bedrooms (sleeps up to 12) — more room to spread out, though fewer bathrooms (3.5) and a slightly lower rating. The statement-piece, more-space option.

Amazing property in the opera district! Very walkable to many sites and beautifully renovated. We would definitely come back.Samantha · Group trip · January 2026
Great for large parties — we had 9 people and the 6 bedrooms were fantastic and hard to find in Paris.Alison · Charlotte · April 2026
Everything was clean, the bedrooms were nice, comfy beds, well stocked. Just as advertised!Seetal · Chicago · Feb 2026
Location 47Walkability 13Sleep quality 12Bathroom 12Nearby 11Decor 9
How it compares
  • More space: 6 bedrooms / sleeps 12 — roomy even for our 8.
  • Bolder look: colorful, gold, art-deco glam vs the calm walnut-and-marble of the Opéra flat.
  • Same central base: calm street, lively quarter, same trusted Merveil host.
  • Trade-offs: only 3.5 baths, 4.72 rating, a touch more per person.

③ Monceau · the palace

One-of-a-Kind Home near Parc Monceau

📍 8th arr. · near Parc Monceau, Opéra & Champs-Élysées
10 guests4 bedrooms5 beds3 bathsEntire flat
★★★★★5.0 · 50 reviews🏅 Guest Favorite · Superhost
The damage · per person
Split 8 ways
$639 /person
all-in for 4 nights
Whole apartment
$5,110 total
$6,220 · $1,278 / night
Prices include all fees · Free cancellation before 1 Aug · Self check-in with building staff
🍳 Kitchen📶 Wifi❄️ Central A/C🛁 Bathtub🧺 Washer + dryer🛗 Elevator📺 TV🐾 Pets allowed+ 35 more
The place

A genuine Belle-Époque showpiece — frescoed ceilings, a crystal chandelier, gilded boiserie, herringbone floors, and a marble spa-bath. The most jaw-dropping, statement flat of the bunch, and a perfect ★5.0 across 50 reviews.

Steps from Parc Monceau (one of the prettiest parks in Paris) in the elegant 8th, minutes to the Opéra and Champs-Élysées. Trade-off vs the Opéra/Mauroy flats: only 3 bathrooms for 8, and a touch further from dead-centre.

We had a lovely stay at Amelie & Benoit's gorgeous place. A group of 8 adults (4 couples) and it was more than enough room.Michael James · New York · Group trip
Beautiful place for a large family. Makes you feel so royal, like you're in a palace — the hosts were extremely easy to reach.Liah · New York · April 2026
Excellent location, amazing amenities, and an all-around fabulous stay. Beautiful, comfortable, exactly as described.Debra · Toronto · Group trip · May 2026
Hospitality 36Location 25Indoor spaces 18Comfort 14Decor 12Walkability 9
Why it's special
  • Perfect rating: ★5.0 (50 reviews), Guest Favorite, Superhost — the highest-rated option.
  • The wow factor: a literal painted-ceiling Parisian salon — unforgettable for a girls' trip.
  • Elegant & walkable: Parc Monceau on the doorstep; scenic, easy to get around.
  • Watch: 3 baths for 8, and the 8th is slightly less central than Opéra.

④ Loft · the cool one

Fantastic Architect Loft near Metro

📍 17th arr. · near Guy Môquet metro (north of centre)
10 guests5 bedrooms5 beds4 baths180m² · patio
★★★★★4.87 · 150 reviews🏅 Guest Favorite · Superhost
The damage · per person
Split 8 ways
$350 /person
all-in for 4 nights · cheapest!
Whole apartment
$2,798 total
$3,766 · priced lower than usual
Free cancellation before 1 Aug · Self check-in with a lockbox · Most reviews of any option (150)
🍳 Kitchen📶 Wifi🪴 Private patio🧺 Washer + dryer📺 TV💻 Workspace+ 38 more
The place

A 180m² architect-designed loft — double-height glass roof, exposed brick, a private patio, an industrial-chic vibe more like a downtown New York loft than a classic Paris flat. The best value by far ($350/person) and the most-reviewed (150) at 4.87.

The honest catch: it's near Guy Môquet (17th), a real residential neighbourhood further north/out than the others — a metro ride to the central sights rather than a stroll. Great if we want space, character, and savings over being dead-central.

Why it's tempting
  • Way cheaper: $350/person — roughly half the others, on a "priced lower than usual" deal.
  • Most proven: 150 reviews at 4.87, Guest Favorite, exceptional check-in.
  • Unique space: huge architect loft with a patio — great for all of us together.
  • Trade-off: 17th arr., further out — more metro, less walk-out-the-door than the brief wants.

⑤ Grenelle · the Eiffel one

Merveil — Signature Suite, Grenelle

📍 7th arr. · near the Eiffel Tower · same Merveil host
10 guests5 bedrooms5 beds5.5 bathsEntire flat
★★★★★4.85 · 48 reviews🏅 Guest Favorite · rare find
The damage · per person
Split 8 ways
$614 /person
all-in for 4 nights
Whole apartment
$4,908 total
$1,227 / night · usually booked
Free cancellation before 1 Aug · Self check-in with a lockbox · 5.5 baths — most of any option
🍳 Kitchen📶 Wifi🛗 Elevator🧺 Washer + dryer📺 HDTV💻 Workspace🪟 Courtyard view+ 48 more
The place

An elegant, beautifully-designed flat with noble materials and Monet-nymphéas-inspired art, a calm cream palette warmed by a deep-red velvet sofa. Same trusted Merveil host as the Opéra & Mauroy flats, with the most bathrooms (5.5) for our group.

It's in the 7th near the Eiffel Tower — catch tower views on a stroll, in a calm, central, dining-rich neighbourhood. A lovely, more residential-grand alternative to the Opéra cluster.

Why it's lovely
  • Eiffel on your stroll: 7th arr., walkable to the tower and great for dining out.
  • Most bathrooms: 5.5 baths for 8 — zero queueing.
  • Trusted host & design: Merveil's calm, Guest-Favorite aesthetic; a "rare find."
  • Note: a bit pricier ($614pp) and slightly further from Opéra/Marais nightlife.
View on Airbnb →
Right outside the door

Choose your own adventure

Most of the flats sit in the same central Opéra/8th pocket, so this is the lay of the land — what's an easy walk or a couple of metro stops away. Pick a mood and wander. (The Loft in the 17th is a bit further out, so it leans more metro than stroll.)

On foot
Walkable from the central flats (Opéra, Mauroy, Monceau, Grenelle)
🎭
Palais Garnier (Opéra)
The opera house · the area's showpiece
🚶 ~8 min
🛍️
Galeries Lafayette & Printemps
Grand department stores + free rooftop view
🚶 ~8 min
🌳
Parc Monceau
One of the prettiest parks — on Monceau's doorstep
🚶 varies
🥐
Rue des Martyrs (SoPi)
The foodie street — bakeries, coffee, wine bars
🚶 ~12 min
⛪
Montmartre & Sacré-Cœur
Up the hill for the view; doable on foot
🚶 ~25 min
A short metro hop
Metro everywhere — the central flats are minutes from lines 8, 9, 7, 12
🖼️
The Louvre & Tuileries
~10 min by metro, or a 25-min stroll
🚇 ~10 min
🗼
Eiffel Tower
On Grenelle's doorstep; easy metro from the others
🚇 ~25 min
🍷
Le Marais
Bars, vintage, falafel, late nights
🚇 ~15 min
🥖
Latin Quarter / Saint-Germain
Left-bank cafés & bookshops
🚇 ~15 min
By train
For day-trips or the next leg — major stations are minutes away
🚄
Gare du Nord
Eurostar to London · trains north & to CDG
🚕 ~10 min
🚆
Gare de l'Est
East of France · Champagne day-trips (Reims ~45 min)
🚕 ~10 min
🚉
Gare Saint-Lazare
Normandy · Giverny / Versailles direction
🚇 ~10 min
✈️
CDG Airport
RER B from Gare du Nord, or a direct cab
🚕 ~40 min
